title: stenogyne lactea
intro: Stenogyne lactea, a flowering plant species native to Hawaii, is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Stenogyne lactea include wound healing, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
